title: Expenditure of public funds
doc_html:
§461.  Expenditure of public funds

A local housing authority may expend public funds in any manner related to the exercise of the powers granted to a housing authority under this Chapter and otherwise existing under other applicable law.

Acts 1997, No. 1188, §1.
